endpoints.name: Get subscription definitions
endpoints.description: Get a list of all subscription definitions for the portal

subscriptionDefinitions.description: Receive timely updates with the latest blog posts.
subscriptionDefinitions.name: Default HubSpot Blog Subscription

subscriptionDefinitions.description: Receive feedback requests and customer service information.
subscriptionDefinitions.name: Customer Service Communication

endpoints.notes: Replace {{HUBAPI_API_KEY}} with your HUBAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get subscription statuses for a contact
endpoints.description: Returns a list of subscriptions and their status for a given contact.

subscriptionStatuses.description: Receive timely updates with the latest blog posts.
subscriptionStatuses.legalBasisExplanation: At users request, we opted them in
subscriptionStatuses.name: Default HubSpot Blog Subscription

subscriptionStatuses.legalBasisExplanation: User has requested to be opted out
subscriptionStatuses.name: One to One

endpoints.notes: Replace {{HUBAPI_API_KEY}} with your HUBAPI API KEY. Replace {{EMAILADDRESS}} with a real emailaddress.

endpoints.name: Subscribe a contact
endpoints.description: Subscribes a contact to the given subscription type. This API is not valid to use for subscribing a contact at a brand or portal level and will return an error.

sample_response.description: Receive timely updates with the latest blog posts.
sample_response.legalBasisExplanation: At users request, we opted them in
sample_response.name: Default HubSpot Blog Subscription

endpoints.notes: Replace {{HUBAPI_API_KEY}} with your HUBAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Unsubscribe a contact
endpoints.description: Unsubscribes a contact from the given subscription type. This API is not valid to use for unsubscribing a contact at a brand or portal level and will return an error.

sample_response.description: Receive timely updates with the latest blog posts.
sample_response.legalBasisExplanation: At users request, we opted them out
sample_response.name: Default HubSpot Blog Subscription

endpoints.notes: Replace {{HUBAPI_API_KEY}} with your HUBAPI API KEY.
